name: io.github.justadityaraj/amazon-in-mcp-server
title: Amazon.in MCP Server
description: Search Amazon.in: cheapest in-stock, best-value picks, product details, Keepa price-history.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_IN_AFFILIATE_TAG
environmentVariables.description: Override the default Amazon Associates tag baked into emitted amazon.in URLs. Set to an empty string to disable affiliate tagging entirely.
